candidate_lesson: When internal regime confirmation runs internal-only (no external TV signals in the last 2h) AND confidence is capped at 65%, the 75% sizing multiplier should be tightened further to 60% because internal-only MOMENTUM calls lack cross-validation and are the regime-appropriateness failure mode Tenet 2 warns against.
testable_rule: if regime_confirmation.source == 'internal_only' and regime_confirmation.confidence <= 0.65: sizing_multiplier = min(sizing_multiplier, 0.60)
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
